sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32758" key="e)kproba/llw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκπροβάλλω</orth>, <sense id="n32758.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">expel,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βρέφος ἠλιτόμηνον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:241" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">241</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
